product: Genie One enhancements and bug fixes
tagline: Ontology snippets (Public Preview): Genie One now supports ontology snippets.
what_it_does: Ontology snippets (Public Preview): Genie One now supports ontology snippets. This feature is in Public Preview. Contact your Databricks account team to sign up.
why_it_matters: This generates more accurate responses and reduces latency by reducing the amount of data Genie One needs to crawl and query.
plain_summary: Ontology snippets (Public Preview): Genie One now supports ontology snippets. This feature is in Public Preview.
key_takeaway: Ontology snippets (Public Preview): Genie One now supports ontology snippets.
